name: AZQ Stage 2 Wave A Checks
purpose: Define task-specific automated checks for Stage 2 Wave A so the Codex runner can evaluate the current Formam storage-foundation tasks without hardcoding all task logic.

baseline_checks.name: compileall
baseline_checks.description: Verify the azq package still compiles after the patch.

baseline_checks.name: formam_storage_import
baseline_checks.description: Verify the new Formam storage module imports cleanly.

STAGE2-WAVEA-01.description: Create Formam package and storage module scaffolding.

checks.name: formam_storage_files_exist
checks.description: Verify the new Formam package and storage module exist.

human_checks: No CLI wiring or command behavior changes were introduced yet.
The patch is limited to Formam scaffolding and tiny import-safe changes only.

STAGE2-WAVEA-02.description: Add canonical Formam path constants and directory helpers.

checks.name: formam_path_helpers_smoke
checks.description: Verify Formam path and directory helpers exist for canonical deliverable and goal-map storage.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['FORM_DIR', 'DATA_FORM_DIR'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['DELIVERABLES_DIR', 'FORM_DELIVERABLES_DIR'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['MAPS_DIR', 'FORM_MAPS_DIR'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['deliverable_file_path', 'get_deliverable_path'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['goal_map_path', 'map_file_path', 'get_goal_map_path'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['list_deliverable_files', 'list_form_files', 'list_deliverables'])
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['ensure_form_dirs', 'ensure_formam_dirs', 'ensure_deliverables_dir', 'ensure_maps_dir'])

human_checks: All Formam path ownership now lives in azq/formam/storage.py.
Directory helper behavior is deterministic and readable.

STAGE2-WAVEA-03.description: Define the canonical normalized deliverable schema.

checks.name: deliverable_normalization_schema
checks.description: Verify a partial deliverable record normalizes into the canonical Stage 2 schema.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
partial = {'deliverable_id': 'DELIV_001', 'goal_id': 'FINIS_001', 'title': 'Test deliverable'}
fn = getattr(storage, 'normalize_deliverable_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'normalize_deliverable', None)
assert fn is not None, 'normalization helper not found'
result = fn(partial)
for field in ['deliverable_id', 'goal_id', 'title', 'artifact_description', 'dependencies', 'status', 'created']:
    assert field in result, f'missing field: {field}'
assert result['deliverable_id'] == 'DELIV_001'
assert result['goal_id'] == 'FINIS_001'
assert result['title'] == 'Test deliverable'
assert isinstance(result['dependencies'], list)

human_checks: Fallback behavior for missing fields is conservative and explicit.
The normalized schema describes artifact structure, not task work.

STAGE2-WAVEA-04.description: Implement markdown deliverable file serialization and parsing.

checks.name: deliverable_round_trip
checks.description: Verify a canonical deliverable record can round-trip through markdown serialization and parsing.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
record = {
    'deliverable_id': 'DELIV_001',
    'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
    'title': 'Round trip test',
    'artifact_description': 'Produce a visible artifact',
    'dependencies': ['DELIV_000'],
    'status': 'drafted',
    'created': '2026-03-17T00:00:00'
}
serializer = getattr(storage, 'serialize_deliverable_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'deliverable_to_markdown', None)
parser = getattr(storage, 'parse_deliverable_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'deliverable_from_markdown', None)
assert serializer is not None, 'serializer not found'
assert parser is not None, 'parser not found'
text = serializer(record)
parsed = parser(text)
for field in ['deliverable_id', 'goal_id', 'title', 'artifact_description', 'dependencies', 'status', 'created']:
    assert parsed[field] == record[field], f'round-trip mismatch: {field}'

human_checks: The markdown format is human-readable and diff-friendly.
The file format is simple enough for later Agenda code to consume.

STAGE2-WAVEA-05.description: Implement file-backed deliverable repository reads and id allocation.

checks.name: deliverable_repository_helpers_exist
checks.description: Verify file-backed read helpers and next-id allocation helpers exist.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['load_deliverable', 'load_deliverable_by_id']), 'missing single-deliverable loader'
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['load_all_deliverables', 'load_deliverables']), 'missing all-deliverables loader'
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['load_deliverables_for_goal', 'load_goal_deliverables']), 'missing goal deliverables loader'
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['next_deliverable_id', 'get_next_deliverable_id']), 'missing next-id helper'

checks.name: deliverable_repository_helpers_behave_deterministically
checks.description: Verify deliverable repository helpers can load records and compute the next id from canonical files.
checks.code:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from azq.formam import storage
serializer = getattr(storage, 'serialize_deliverable_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'deliverable_to_markdown', None)
path_for = getattr(storage, 'deliverable_file_path', None) or getattr(storage, 'get_deliverable_path', None)
load_one = getattr(storage, 'load_deliverable', None) or getattr(storage, 'load_deliverable_by_id', None)
load_all = getattr(storage, 'load_all_deliverables', None) or getattr(storage, 'load_deliverables', None)
load_for_goal = getattr(storage, 'load_deliverables_for_goal', None) or getattr(storage, 'load_goal_deliverables', None)
next_id = getattr(storage, 'next_deliverable_id', None) or getattr(storage, 'get_next_deliverable_id', None)
assert serializer is not None and path_for is not None
assert load_one is not None and load_all is not None and load_for_goal is not None and next_id is not None
with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    tmp_path = Path(tmp)
    deliverables_attr = 'DELIVERABLES_DIR' if hasattr(storage, 'DELIVERABLES_DIR') else 'FORM_DELIVERABLES_DIR'
    setattr(storage, deliverables_attr, tmp_path / 'deliverables')
    getattr(storage, deliverables_attr).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    records = [
        {
            'deliverable_id': 'DELIV_001',
            'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
            'title': 'First deliverable',
            'artifact_description': 'desc 1',
            'dependencies': [],
            'status': 'drafted',
            'created': '2026-03-17'
        },
        {
            'deliverable_id': 'DELIV_002',
            'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
            'title': 'Second deliverable',
            'artifact_description': 'desc 2',
            'dependencies': ['DELIV_001'],
            'status': 'drafted',
            'created': '2026-03-17'
        }
    ]
    for record in records:
        path_for(record['deliverable_id']).write_text(serializer(record), encoding='utf-8')
    assert load_one('DELIV_001')['title'] == 'First deliverable'
    assert [item['deliverable_id'] for item in load_all()] == ['DELIV_001', 'DELIV_002']
    assert [item['deliverable_id'] for item in load_for_goal('FINIS_001')] == ['DELIV_001', 'DELIV_002']
    assert next_id() == 'DELIV_003'

human_checks: Exact lookup uses exact deliverable_id and goal_id matching.

checks.name: goal_validation_helper_exists
checks.description: Verify Formam exposes a dedicated goal validation helper.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['validate_goal_id', 'validate_parent_goal', 'require_goal']), 'missing goal validation helper'

checks.name: goal_validation_checks_exact_goal_id
checks.description: Verify the goal validation helper can be driven with an exact canonical goal id.
checks.code:
from unittest.mock import patch
from azq.formam import storage
validator = getattr(storage, 'validate_goal_id', None) or getattr(storage, 'validate_parent_goal', None) or getattr(storage, 'require_goal', None)
assert validator is not None
with patch('azq.finis.storage.load_goal', return_value={'goal_id': 'FINIS_001', 'title': 'Parent goal', 'status': 'active', 'created': '', 'description': '', 'derived_from': []}):
    result = validator('FINIS_001')
assert result is not None

human_checks: Goal validation is clearly separated from future command-layer presentation.
The helper makes missing-parent failures inspectable rather than silent.

STAGE2-WAVEA-07.description: Define the canonical normalized goal-map schema.

checks.name: goal_map_normalization_schema
checks.description: Verify a partial goal-map record normalizes into the canonical Stage 2 map schema.

human_checks: The goal-map schema remains human-readable and goal-centered.
Map normalization does not invent fake dependency structure beyond safe defaults.

checks.name: goal_map_round_trip
checks.description: Verify a canonical goal-map record can round-trip through markdown serialization and parsing.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
record = {
    'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
    'deliverable_ids': ['DELIV_001', 'DELIV_002'],
    'dependency_edges': ['DELIV_001 -> DELIV_002'],
    'status': 'mapped',
    'created': '2026-03-17T00:00:00',
    'notes': 'Initial dependency sketch'
}
serializer = getattr(storage, 'serialize_goal_map_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'goal_map_to_markdown', None)
parser = getattr(storage, 'parse_goal_map_record', None) or getattr(storage, 'goal_map_from_markdown', None)
assert serializer is not None, 'goal map serializer not found'
assert parser is not None, 'goal map parser not found'
text = serializer(record)
parsed = parser(text)
for field in ['goal_id', 'deliverable_ids', 'dependency_edges', 'status', 'created', 'notes']:
    assert parsed[field] == record[field], f'round-trip mismatch: {field}'

human_checks: The map markdown format is inspectable by a human without tool-specific knowledge.
Dependency sections remain readable even if they are sparse.

STAGE2-WAVEA-09.description: Add canonical Formam write helpers for deliverables and maps.

checks.name: formam_write_helpers_exist
checks.description: Verify storage.py exposes canonical write helpers for both deliverables and goal maps.
checks.code:
from azq.formam import storage
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['write_deliverable', 'save_deliverable', 'upsert_deliverable']), 'missing deliverable write helper'
assert any(hasattr(storage, name) for name in ['write_goal_map', 'save_goal_map', 'upsert_goal_map']), 'missing goal map write helper'

checks.name: formam_write_helpers_write_canonical_files
checks.description: Verify one normalized deliverable and one normalized goal map can be persisted as canonical Formam files.
checks.code:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from azq.formam import storage
write_deliverable = getattr(storage, 'write_deliverable', None) or getattr(storage, 'save_deliverable', None) or getattr(storage, 'upsert_deliverable', None)
write_goal_map = getattr(storage, 'write_goal_map', None) or getattr(storage, 'save_goal_map', None) or getattr(storage, 'upsert_goal_map', None)
assert write_deliverable is not None, 'deliverable write helper not found'
assert write_goal_map is not None, 'goal map write helper not found'
with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    tmp_path = Path(tmp)
    deliverables_attr = 'DELIVERABLES_DIR' if hasattr(storage, 'DELIVERABLES_DIR') else 'FORM_DELIVERABLES_DIR'
    maps_attr = 'MAPS_DIR' if hasattr(storage, 'MAPS_DIR') else 'FORM_MAPS_DIR'
    setattr(storage, deliverables_attr, tmp_path / 'deliverables')
    setattr(storage, maps_attr, tmp_path / 'maps')
    deliverable_record = {
        'deliverable_id': 'DELIV_123',
        'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
        'title': 'Write helper test',
        'artifact_description': 'Produce a stable artifact',
        'dependencies': [],
        'status': 'drafted',
        'created': '2026-03-17'
    }
    goal_map_record = {
        'goal_id': 'FINIS_001',
        'deliverable_ids': ['DELIV_123'],
        'dependency_edges': [],
        'status': 'mapped',
        'created': '2026-03-17',
        'notes': ''
    }
    deliverable_path = write_deliverable(deliverable_record)
    goal_map_path = write_goal_map(goal_map_record)
    assert deliverable_path.is_file(), 'canonical deliverable file was not written'
    assert goal_map_path.is_file(), 'canonical goal map file was not written'
    assert deliverable_path.name == 'DELIV_123.md'
    assert goal_map_path.name == 'GOAL_FINIS_001_MAP.md'

human_checks: The write-side storage boundary remains in azq/formam/storage.py.
Each write helper rewrites exactly one canonical file in the correct Formam directory.
